calendar.matters:
Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Aug-01-2011 Text Ruling

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2901 - 2905 Clement Street/405 - 407 30th Avenue)
Off Calendar Jul-22-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet Boessenecker for and with Rita Lin.

The sale was confirmed at $1,215,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
